active.query: Platxa improvement roadmap: deep analysis of Lovable-like Odoo website generation system with frontend agent and brand kit - what to build next

subtopics: End-to-end system integration gaps and priorities
Design token pipeline and brand differentiation

search_queries.purpose: Analyze gaps between website-studio, editor-sync, and frontend-agent

search_queries.query: DTCG design token pipeline for AI generation
OKLCH color space dark mode derivation
search_queries.purpose: Modern color science for brand kits

search_queries.query: AI website builder quality gates CI/CD
Brand consistency scoring AI generated sites

findings.title: Platxa Website Studio - Current State Analysis
key_points: Next.js frontend with chat interface, file explorer, editor panel, and blob URL preview with device frames
AI tools defined for theme, page, snippet, style, and menu generation using Zod schemas
Handlebars template renderer generates Odoo __manifest__.py, SCSS variables, bootstrap overrides, custom SCSS
Project store (Zustand) manages files, project config, Odoo connection status
WebSocket sync manager connects to platxa-editor-sync sidecar for file operations and deploy events
Preview uses generatePreviewHtml() with QWebRuntime for static rendering - no live Odoo connection
CRITICAL GAP: AI generation pipeline not connected to frontend-agent orchestrator

findings.title: Platxa Frontend Agent - Comprehensive Module Analysis
key_points: Sophisticated multi-agent architecture with FrontendOrchestrator (5-step pipeline: analyze, generate, animate, theme, accessibility)
Multi-Agent Coordinator with 5 distribution strategies (round-robin, least-busy, capability-match, priority-based, random) and 5 aggregation strategies
OKLCH palette generation, atomic design system, design tokens, modern CSS, brand guidelines generator
Accessibility auditor, ESLint plugin, component docs generator, visual regression test support
Animation worker with presets, devtools panel, page sections module, Storybook integration
30+ test files with extensive coverage across all modules
CRITICAL GAP: Not wired to website-studio UI or editor-sync backend - exists as standalone library

findings.title: Platxa Editor Sync - Real-Time Collaboration Infrastructure
key_points: Production-grade Yjs CRDT integration with per-file WebSocket connections at /ws/doc/{path}
Debounced disk persistence (300ms), automatic git commits for version history
AI integration via updateDocContent() using doc.transact() to broadcast diffs to all clients
Session tracker, file service, log streamer for deployment events
y-websocket v2.x constraint (v3 removed required server-side API)
STRENGTH: Already has the foundation for AI/human co-editing that competitors lack
GAP: Awareness protocol not implemented yet - cannot show AI editing indicators to users

findings.title: Lovable.dev Architecture - Key Competitive Insights
key_points: Achieved 00M ARR in 8 months with AI-powered full-stack web app builder
Visual Edits via custom Vite plugin: compile-time JSX tagging, client-side AST processing (Babel/SWC), HMR
Agent Mode: Plan->Search->Read->Edit->Test cycle for autonomous multi-step tasks
Three modes: Agent Mode (autonomous), Chat Mode (planning only), Code Mode (manual editing)
Cloud-hosted dev servers on Fly.io (4000+ instances) - NOT WebContainers
RAG for codebase understanding - retrieves relevant existing code for context
KEY INSIGHT: Visual editing reduces AI costs by enabling precise changes without AI intervention
KEY INSIGHT: Component library (shadcn/ui) acts as design system guardrail constraining output quality

findings.title: AI Brand Kit - State of the Art Gap Analysis
key_points: NO tool unifies brand generation + design tokens + code generation in a single AI pipeline
W3C DTCG token format reaching maturity but AI agents don't consume tokens - they use hardcoded shadcn defaults
Current Platxa: 11 industry presets with color palette + typography but no DTCG format, no WCAG validation
Missing: OKLCH-based dark mode derivation, 10-step color scales, fluid typography with clamp()
Missing: Brand consistency scoring (0-100 measuring token compliance across generated output)
Missing: Token-to-LLM-context injection (compact format under 500 tokens for system prompts)
OPPORTUNITY: First tool to combine AI brand generation + W3C tokens + AI code generation

findings.title: Multi-Agent Architecture - Production Patterns
key_points: Devin: Full VM sandbox with persistent multi-agent (planner, editor, terminal, browser)
SWE-Agent: Custom Agent-Computer Interface (ACI) designed for LLM cognition outperforms raw shell
OpenHands: Event-driven state machine with pluggable agents following Observe-Action loop
Bolt.new: WebContainers (browser WASM Node.js) for sub-100ms preview, zero server cost
Recommended pattern: Orchestrator-Workers + Evaluator-Optimizer feedback loop
Section-level editing (not page/component) is emerging best practice - matches Platxa snippet architecture
6-stage quality gate: Parse->Compile->Lint->A11y->Render->Visual (each under 2s)

findings.title: AI Website Builder Pain Points - User Research Synthesis
key_points: #1 Generic output: All AI sites look the same, lack brand personality (SOLVED by brand kit)
#2 Iteration friction: Small changes regenerate everything (SOLVED by section-level editing)
#3 No backend logic: Forms dont submit, auth is visual only (Odoo handles this natively)
#4 Code maintainability: 8x more duplication, higher complexity (SOLVED by quality gates)
#5 Inconsistent results: Same prompt produces different output (SOLVED by design token constraints)
#6 Brand drift across pages: Design tokens degraded across generations (SOLVED by token enforcement)
#7 Deployment challenges: Production optimization missing (SOLVED by Odoo module packaging)

active.synthesis: 100 atomic improvement features across 7 categories (System Integration, Design Token Pipeline, Quality Assurance, Visual Editing, Agent Intelligence, Odoo Deployment, Developer Experience) organized in 6 implementation tiers. Key finding: the 3 existing systems (website-studio, frontend-agent, editor-sync) are disconnected silos - wiring them together is the #1 priority before any new features. Brand kit + design tokens is the unique competitive moat. Full synthesis at .claude/findings/SYNTHESIS_PLATXA_IMPROVEMENT_ROADMAP.md
